summary: Frontend testing of Receipt Management UI completed. All 10 features tested successfully. Fixed a backend bug where cancelled receipts were not being returned by the API (hardcoded filter was excluding them). After fix, all features work correctly including: receipt list display, status filter, search filter, view details dialog, cancel receipt flow with accounting reversal warning, cancelled receipt styling (CANCELLED badge + strikethrough), download PDF, add receipt dialog, and delete button visibility for Founder/Admin users.
passed_tests: Receipt list displays correctly with all columns (Receipt #, Date, Project, Customer, Amount, Status, Mode, Actions)
Status filter works (All Status, Active, Cancelled) - 25 total receipts, 4 cancelled, 21 active
Search filter works by receipt number (RCP-20260206-0001 returns 1 result)
Search filter works by project name (Ayisha returns 1 result)
View receipt details dialog shows correct information (amount, date, mode, account, stage, project details, contract value, total received, balance remaining)
Cancel receipt flow opens dialog with warning about accounting reversal
Cancel receipt requires reason input before submission
Cancel receipt API POST /api/finance/receipts/{receipt_id}/cancel works - returns 200 OK
Cancelled receipts show with 'CANCELLED' badge (red destructive badge)
Cancelled receipts show with strikethrough styling on receipt number and amount
Cancelled receipts show with red background (bg-red-50/30)
Cancelled receipt details show cancellation banner with cancelled_by, cancelled_at, and reason
Download PDF button works - toast shows 'PDF downloaded'
Add Receipt button opens creation dialog with all required fields (Project, Amount, Payment Mode, Date, Account)
Delete button visible for Founder user in receipt details dialog
Delete button visible for Admin user in receipt details dialog
Cancel Receipt button hidden for cancelled receipts (correct behavior)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed backend bug: /api/finance/receipts endpoint was hardcoding query to exclude cancelled receipts (status: {$ne: 'cancelled'}). Changed to include_cancelled parameter defaulting to True so frontend can filter locally.
Receipts.jsx correctly implements local filtering for status (all/active/cancelled) at lines 289-301
Cancel receipt flow properly creates reverse accounting entries (double-entry) and updates project financials
Delete button correctly restricted to Founder/Admin roles via isFounderOrAdmin check at line 120
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added include_cancelled parameter to list_receipts endpoint (line 31379-31418)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing receipts (25 total, 4 cancelled)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Receipt Management UI fully tested. Backend API was fixed to return all receipts including cancelled ones (include_cancelled=True by default). 4 cancelled receipts exist in database for testing cancelled receipt styling. Login requires clicking 'Local Admin Login' to expand the email/password form.

bug_fixed.description: Backend API /api/finance/receipts was hardcoding query to exclude cancelled receipts
bug_fixed.root_cause: Line 31394 had query = {'status': {'$ne': 'cancelled'}} which always excluded cancelled receipts
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added include_cancelled parameter (default True) to allow frontend to receive all receipts and filter locally
